steps.title: Define variables and write the area equation
steps.content:
Let w = width (feet). Since the length is 7 feet longer, length = w + 7. Using the area formula:
$$w(w + 7) = 120$$

steps.title: Expand and rearrange to standard form
Factor and solve for the dimensions
steps.content:
Find two numbers that multiply to -120 and add to 7. These are 15 and -8:
$$(w + 15)(w - 8) = 0$$
This gives w = -15 or w = 8. Since width must be positive, w = 8 feet.

Therefore, the length is w + 7 = 8 + 7 = 15 feet.
